executives.name: Roland Busch
executives.background: Roland Busch is President and CEO of Siemens AG. He joined Siemens in 1994 and has held various leadership roles, including COO, CTO, and member of the Managing Board since 2011. He holds a PhD in Physics from the University of Erlangen-Nuremberg.

executives.name: Ralf Thomas
executives.background: Ralf P. Thomas is the CFO of Siemens AG. He joined Siemens in 1995 and has served in various finance leadership roles, including CFO of the Industry Sector. He has been a member of the Managing Board since 2013.

executives.name: Cedrik Neike
executives.background: Cedrik Neike is CEO of Digital Industries and a member of the Managing Board. He joined Siemens in 1997, spent time at Cisco Systems, and returned to Siemens in 2017.

executives.name: Matthias Rebellius
executives.background: Matthias Rebellius is CEO of Smart Infrastructure and a member of the Managing Board. He has been with Siemens since 1988 in various management positions.

executives.name: Judith Wiese
executives.background: Judith Wiese is Chief People and Sustainability Officer (CPSO) and a member of the Managing Board. She joined Siemens in 2020 from Mars Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Jim Hagemann Snabe
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Supervisory Board of Siemens AG. Former Co-CEO of SAP SE. He serves on various boards including Northvolt AB.

board_of_directors.name: Birgit Steinborn
board_of_directors.background: First Deputy Chairwoman of the Supervisory Board. Chairwoman of the Central Works Council of Siemens AG.

board_of_directors.name: Werner Wenning
board_of_directors.background: Second Deputy Chairman of the Supervisory Board. Former Chairman of the Board of Management of Bayer AG.

board_of_directors.name: Benoît Potier
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board of Directors of Air Liquide S.A.

board_of_directors.name: Nathalie von Siemens
board_of_directors.background: Former Managing Director and spokesperson of the Board of Siemens Stiftung.

board_of_directors.name: Grazia Vittadini
board_of_directors.background: Former CTO of Airbus and Rolls-Royce. Expert in aerospace and technology.

board_of_directors.name: Kasper Rørsted
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Adidas AG and Henkel AG & Co. KGaA.
